request: Wire mutation testing as a mechanical test-quality oracle (mutation score over surviving mutants, not line coverage) for the baseline's node --test suite — the first real mechanical oracle for the v1 thought-compiler (slice-A piece 3). Research must settle the mutation tool (Stryker likely; verify via context7) and a tractable run-scoping strategy (per-module/changed-files, not whole-repo). A later tier dial (-1a2d) will configure this oracle's floor/ceiling.
